Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=a fatty acid + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = a fatty acid methyl ester + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:23012, ChEBI:CHEBI:4986, ChEBI:CHEBI:28868, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789; EC=2.1.1.15;
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: O-methyltransferase that modifies the hydroxy group of the fatty acids. Oleate is the most effective fatty acid acceptor. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:12368441}.
